blockingIssues.description: The cross-flow persistence suite still does not test VAL-CROSS-039's required concurrent workflow (pantry add -> generate -> convert -> verify recipes and pantry remain intact), so required no-corruption verification remains missing.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit fallback procedure for required authenticated agent-browser checks when Clerk/Cloudflare bot protection blocks headless sessions (e.g., mandated alternative evidence strategy and handoff wording).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The conversion-cross-flows re-review again reported this mismatch, citing required manual verification steps that are blocked in headless auth while mission guidance already documents the Clerk challenge.
